Mini E-Commerce

Stack:
- PHP, MySQL, Apache
- Bootstrap 5, jQuery

Entry Points:
- index.php (home)
- products.php (product details via slug)
- cart.php, checkout.php
- login.php, signup.php

APIs:
- search_suggestions.php (GET q)
- cart_api.php (POST product_id, qty)

Base Path:
- APP_PATH is calculated in db.php based on DOCUMENT_ROOT

Assets:
- /assets/css/style.css
- /assets/js/main.js
- /assets/js/auth.js

Admin:
- /admin-login -> admin/frontend/admin-login.php
- /admin-panel -> admin/frontend/admin-panel.php
- /admin/backend/product_crud.php

Database:
- Schema: database/schema.sql
- Tables: users, admins, products, orders, order_items
